title: Comments
intro:
HOCON supports two comment styles:

- `# this is a hash comment`
- `// this is a slash comment`

Both run from the marker to the end of the line. Use comments to document menus or temporarily disable a line.

**Goal:** add a comment to the file (any line that starts with `#` or `//`).
goal: Add at least one `#` or `//` comment line.
hints: Add a new line and start it with `#` or `//`.
Try `# this menu shows my shop` above the title line.
